zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton於1189年出生在英國斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特時，他的父親Ralph Basset59歲，母親Alice De Peverel54歲。他和Isabella de Patingham至少有1個兒子。他去世於1252年在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國越可爾可福哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton was born in 1189, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, his father, Ralph Basset, was 59 and his mother, Alice De Peverel, was 54. He had at least 1 son with Isabella de Patingham. He died in 1252, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Coverham, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton est né en 1189, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Basset, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Alice De Peverel, avait 54 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Isabella de Patingham. Il est décédé en 1252, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Coverham, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton 1189 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Basset 59 und seine Mutter Alice De Peverel 54. Er hatte mit Isabella de Patingham mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1252 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Coverham, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton è nato il nel 1189 nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph Basset, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Alice De Peverel, aveva 54 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Isabella de Patingham. Morì nel 1252, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Coverham, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Draytonが1189年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた時，父Ralph Bassetは59歳，母Alice De Peverelは54歳であった。彼はIsabella de Patinghamとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1252年に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアコバーハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton(이)가 1189년 영국 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Basset(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De Peverel(은)는 54세였다. 그는 Isabella de Patingham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1252년 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 커버함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton nasceu em 1189, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Basset, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Peverel, tinha 54 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Isabella de Patingham. Ele faleceu em 1252, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Coverham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton родился в 1189 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Basset было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Peverel, 54. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Isabella de Patingham. Он умер в 1252 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности ковирам, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Basset 2nd Baron Basset of Drayton nació en 1189, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Basset, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Alice De Peverel, tenía 54 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Isabella de Patingham. Murió en 1252, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Coverham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
